notes: Second wordplay pack (wordplay-001.json was the first). Anagram pairs already used in wordplay-001: silent→listen, thing→night, state→taste, earth→heart, dusty→study, stressed→desserts, a rope→opera, the eyes→they see. B&A already used: Muhammad Ali Baba, Tom Cruise control, Jack Black Widow, Harrison Ford Mustang, Stephen King Kong.
Five new anagram pairs: stare↔tears, charm↔march, nails↔snail, thorn↔north, lemon↔melon.
Five new B&A: ROCK STAR WARS (Star), ICE CREAM CHEESE (Cream), SMALL TALK SHOW (Talk), BREADWINNER TAKES ALL (Winner), FIREWORKS OF ART (Works).
All answers verified distinct from wordplay-001.json.
